---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in PromptLint
title: "bug: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction

Minimal steps to reproduce the behavior:

```
pnpm install
pnpm build
./node_modules/.bin/promptlint ...
```

Or a link to a public repository.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include full CLI output and stack traces.

## Environment

- PromptLint version: (run `promptlint --version`)
- Node.js version: (run `node --version`)
- pnpm version: (run `pnpm --version`)
- OS: (e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)

## Additional context

Logs, screenshots, or any other relevant information.
